zh.lifeSummary: 當Bridget Bassett於大約1305年出生在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特時，她的父親Sir Knight Richard Basset41歲，母親Joan Huntingfield27歲。她於大約1330年與Sir John de Seyton在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於大約1335年在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年32歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bridget Bassett于大约1305年出生在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾薩普可特时，她的父亲Sir Knight Richard Basset41岁，母亲Joan Huntingfield27岁。她于大约1330年与Sir John de Seyton在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于大约1335年在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓享年32岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bassett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from Old French basset ‘of low stature’, a diminutive of basse ‘low, short’, either a nickname for a short person or a status name for someone of humble origins.
Altered form of French Bessette 1 or Besset (see Bessette 2).

History: William Bassett (c. 1598–1667) came to Plymouth, MA, from Kent, England, in the 1620s; c. 1650 he moved to Duxbury and subesequently to Bridgewater. He had many prominent descendants, among them one of the earliest families on Martha's Vineyard. — The surname Bassett of French origin (see 2 above) is listed in the register of Huguenot ancestors recognized by the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Bessette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Marcel, Armand, Adrien, Normand, Alphonse, Lucien, Cecile, Herve, Jacques, Laurent, Aime.

French: topographic name designating a small wood of birches, from Occitan bès ‘birch tree’ (see Besse ), or a habitational name from (La) Bessette, the name of several places in the southern part of France.
Alternatively, an altered form of French Besset: topographic name, a cognate of 1 above. Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t.

nameMeanings.name: Bridget
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Brighid (pronounced ‘breed’); . This was the name of an ancient Celtic goddess, which in Gaulish would have been Brigindos, meaning ‘the exalted one’. St Brigid of Kildare ( c.450– c.525 ) is one of the patron saints of Ireland. Very few facts are known about her life. She founded a religious house for women at Kildare, and is said to be have been buried at Downpatrick, where St Patrick and St Columba were also buried. Many of the stories of miracles told about St Brigid seem to be Christianized versions of pagan legends concerning the goddess. The popularity of the name was further reinforced throughout Europe, especially in Scandinavia in the form Birgit , as the name of the patron saint of Sweden ( 1304–73 ). She was a noblewoman of Irish stock who, after the death of her husband, founded an order of nuns, the Bridgettines. Later she went to Rome and attempted to introduce religious reforms there.

en.lifeSummary: When Bridget Bassett was born about 1305, in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Knight Richard Basset, was 41 and her mother, Joan Huntingfield, was 27. She married Sir John de Seyton about 1330, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died about 1335, in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 32.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bridget Bassett est née environ 1305, à Sapcote, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Richard Basset, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Joan Huntingfield, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Seyton environ 1330, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée environ 1335, à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 32 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bridget Bassett um 1305 in Sapcote, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Knight Richard Basset 41 und ihre Mutter Joan Huntingfield 27. Sie hat um 1330 in Buckinghamshire, England Sir John de Seyton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1335 im Alter von 32 Jahren in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Bassett è nata il circa 1305 nel Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Knight Richard Basset, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Joan Huntingfield, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Seyton circa 1330, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1335, nel Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 32 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Bridget Bassettが約1305年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアサプコトで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Richard Bassetは41歳，母Joan Huntingfieldは27歳であった。約1330年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでSir John de Seytonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は約1335年にイギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンで32歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Bridget Bassett(이)가 대략 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 사p컷에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight Richard Basset(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Huntingfield(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 대략 1330년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Sir John de Seyton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1335년 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에서 32세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bridget Bassett nasceu aproximadamente 1305, em Sapcote, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Richard Basset, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Joan Huntingfield, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Seyton aproximadamente 1330, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1335, em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 32 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bridget Bassett родилась около 1305 г. в местности сапкот, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Knight Richard Basset было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Huntingfield, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Seyton около 1330 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла около 1335 г. в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 32 лет.
